title: Device Home Screen - Connecting multiple headsets
scenario: Device home screen fails to display all connected headsets when multiple devices are paired and connected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Pair and connect two or more Poly Bluetooth headsets to the Android device
Navigate to the Home screen of the app
Observe the dots at the bottom of the Home screen indicating the number of connected devices
Swipe left or right on the Home screen to navigate between connected devices
expected: The Home screen displays all connected devices properly. Dots at the bottom indicate the number of connected devices and which device is currently displayed. Swiping left or right navigates between each connected device smoothly.
